assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud commands to check versions, kubectl get nodes, kubectl get pods for health, and node status verification

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 includes the exact command: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone $ZONE --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)" | grep -E "1\.(29|30)"'

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 1.4 includes the specific command: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated || echo "No deprecated APIs found"'

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.29 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: Step 2.1 includes the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --zone $ZONE --master --cluster-version $TARGET_129'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 2.3 includes verification commands with expected outputs clearly stated: 'All system pods Running, nodes list displays normally'

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for each node pool upgrade to 1.29
assertions.reason: Steps 3.2 and 3.4 provide exact commands for both node pools: 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade default-pool' and 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade workload-pool' with all required flags

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 3.3 and 3.5 include specific monitoring commands using 'watch' to track node status and upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Repeats the full sequence for 1.29→1.30 (sequential, not skipping)
assertions.reason: Phase 4 repeats the complete sequence: control plane upgrade first (step 4.1), then both node pools (step 4.3), maintaining the sequential approach from 1.29 to 1.30

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 5 includes comprehensive validation: node versions check, pod health checks, kube-system pods verification, and application smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: The Troubleshooting section provides specific guidance for common issues like pods not draining, stuck operations, and workload issues, though it doesn't include explicit rollback commands
